item.title: STREETWORKS!... Recently renewed ironwork is already banging & clanking like hell - needs redoing or getting contractor/utility back pronto if not originally undertaken by GCC., 11th June

item.category: No rain in 24 hours - water has increased or remained the same

item.title: Planks on bridge are broken, 11th June
item.description:
I know you've inspected the bridge, but its now in a dangerous state - one of the planks has given way and others look unsafe.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stump Lane, Hucclecote, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Ridiculous amount of available footway width marked up as given over to E-Scooter storage/deposit bays. How can in excess of 75-80% of the footway width be allocated in this way? Did GCC mark this up/sanction it? Was this done by Cheltenham BC or the E-Scooter firm without GCC being fully consulted/involved? This forces pedestrians towards footway edge and nearly into the carriageway! 2 people would struggle to pass each other here when numerous scooters are offloaded and mobility vehicles may not fit without toppling into carriageway, plus what about visually impaired people or those led by guide dogs? Really have to ask who is doing the due diligence scrutiny & safety auditing of this stuff on the ground when this it is being proposed, designed, and implemented and who is signing it off post completion!? NEEDS SERIOUS REVIEWING!, 11th June
item.description:
(As marked on map) On footway of Gloucester Rd adj to Jctn Honeybourne Way.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 28, Gloucester Road, Wymans Brook, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Road marking white lines or studs

item.title: Manhole keeping me awake at night as vehicles drive over it, 11th June
item.description:
Every time a vehicle drives over the manhole is makes an awful noise. Its waking me up at night. Please rectify asap. Located in the road on Church Road junction with Blacksmith Lane.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 3, Church Road, Churchdown, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Crossing audible sound too loud/soft problem, 11th June
item.description:
customer states pedestrian crossing close to junction causes issue when coming round corner of junction due to both sets of lights too close to eachother. please see letter and description
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocking visibility on road/junction (Grass/verge) problem, 11th June
item.description:
Customer reports that the resident of the location has installed a gateway approximately where indicated on the map, but has no VDK. Furthermore, they believe that their excavations have undermined the embankment. They feel it is their duty to report this, as it is potentially dangerous and ask that it is investigated.
Report on FixMyStreet
